reasoning: We need to address the limiters identified in your last ride by focusing on lactate clearance and aerobic base development. With Alpine Loop in mind, this session aims to build fatigue resistance for sustained climbs similar to the key segment from Sundance to Cascade Springs.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x12 minutes of over-unders: 2 min 229W (96%), 2 min 251W (106%), 2 min 229W (96%), repeat, with 5 min recovery in Zone 2 between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
